input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.1.1
            TITLE: tractive system – ts

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.1.1: Tractive System – TS
EV.1.1 Tractive System – TS  
Every part electrically connected to the Motor(s) and/or Accumulator(s)

final_answer: rule EV.1.1: Tractive System – TS EV.1.1 Tractive System – TS Every part electrically connected to the Motor(s) and/or Accumulator(s)
